diagrams.title: LSTM Architecture Overview
diagrams.description: Complete LSTM cell showing cell state (top horizontal line), hidden state, and three gates (forget, input, output) with their connections
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how information flows through LSTM and the role of each component

diagrams.title: LSTM Gate Operations
diagrams.description: Detailed view of how each gate computes its output using previous hidden state and current input
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the mathematical operations in LSTM gates

diagrams.title: Cell State Update Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of how cell state is modified at each time step
elements: Forget gate output f(t) multiplied with C(t-1)
Input gate output i(t) multiplied with candidate C̃(t)
New cell state C(t) = f(t)×C(t-1) + i(t)×C̃(t)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how LSTM preserves and updates memory over time

diagrams.title: Bidirectional LSTM
diagrams.description: Two LSTM networks processing sequence in opposite directions with combined output
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how bidirectional LSTMs capture context from both past and future
